videos.title: AO x NTS Radio - Ep 1: Nigerian Underground
videos.description:
Played live on NTS Radio on 16/03/26 from Lagos

AO RADIO PRESENTS NIGERIAN UNDERGROUND W/ RACHEL, ROBERTO, ONA & EBUBE

Paxslim's Africa Only Radio explores the Nigerian underground scene. The first episode features Rachel, Roberto, Ona and Ebube, each selecting tracks by emerging artists from across the scene.
Rachel runs The Process Africa documenting young African creatives, based in Lagos. Roberto runs Soundgasm, a Toronto-based platform covering music from Nigeria and the diaspora. Ona is an artist manager and A&R, whilst Ebube is a video creator and commentator. Mixed by Haram, Paxslim's longtime producer and collaborator.

videos.title: AO x NTS Radio - Ep 4: Kenyan Underground
videos.description:
Played live on NTS Radio on 18/04/26

Africa Only is an ongoing cultural and musical project exploring underground sounds, scenes and artistic movements across the African continent and the diaspora. Curated by the artist Paxslim, the series highlights artists, communities and sonic histories rooted in African and Afro-diasporic identity.
Each episode focuses on a different scene, bringing together music, research and storytelling to spotlight emerging and influential voices shaping contemporary underground culture.

Paxslims Africa Only Radio Episode 4 explores the Kenyan underground scene.
Featuring selections from artist and DJ Lilmaina, model, creative and stylist Asha, storyteller and Escape Plan founder Amari Moto, and creative director, designer and stylist Rosemary. 
Mixed by Haram, Paxslim's longtime producer.
